PATIENT_ID: TEST_DELIRIUM_CONSULT_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[CONSULT_NOTE] 2026-01-17 22:34:00
Geriatric Trauma Consultation:
Patient developed delirium on hospital day 3.
Acute confusional state with waxing and waning consciousness.
CAM positive — features of inattention, altered level of consciousness,
and disorganized thinking present.
Recommend haloperidol PRN for agitation.
